title: Ranaghat College Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Ranaghat College Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Ranaghat College Result 2026 Out for UG 5th Semester BA, BSc and BCom CBCS and NEP exams on the official website - ranaghatcollege.org.in on 20-04-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Ranaghat College Result 2026.

content.text: Ranaghat College has officially released the UG 5th Semester Result 2025 for BA, BSc and BCom programmes under CBCS and NEP on its official website. The latest Ranaghat College Result 2026 covers UG 5th Semester BA Honours, BA General, BSc Honours, BSc General, BCom Honours, BCom General (CBCS) and UG 5th Semester Result 2025 (NEP), all published on 20 April 2026.

Ranaghat College Result 2026 has been published online on the official website - ranaghatcollege.org.in. Students can check and download their UG 5th semester marksheet by visiting the examination result portal and accessing the respective result link using their roll number or other required details, as followed in previous result processes. After downloading the result, candidates are advised to verify their name, roll number, course, semester and marks, and contact Ranaghat College in case of any discrepancy in the published result.

Ranaghat College has published the UG 5th Semester 2025 results for BA, BSc and BCom courses under CBCS and NEP pattern on the official exam result page. Students from Honours and General streams can now download their Ranaghat College Result 2026 in online mode and use the direct result links provided by the college for quick access.

Ranaghat College has activated separate direct links for all UG 5th Semester 2025 results on its examination result page so that students can quickly download their marksheets. These Ranaghat College Result 2026 direct links are available for BA, BSc and BCom Honours and General under CBCS, as well as for UG 5th Semester Result 2025 under NEP. Students can view or download their semester wise results instantly through the official portal using the links given below.

sections.heading: How to Download Ranaghat College Result 2026

content.text: Follow the steps below to check and download your Ranaghat College UG 5th Semester Result 2026 online:

items: Visit the official Ranaghat College website ranaghatcollege.org.in.
On the homepage, click on the Examination Result link or directly go to the result page at frmexamresult.aspx.
Look for the latest links for UG 5th Semester BA, BSc, BCom 2025 (CBCS) and UG 5th Semester Result 2025 (NEP).
Click on the relevant result link for your course and stream (Honours or General).
The result file or marksheet (usually in Excel/PDF format) will open or start downloading on your device.
Open the file to view your subject wise marks, total marks and result status.
Download and save the Ranaghat College Result 2026 and take a printout for future academic reference and verification.
